control_awareness: Aware that P2P-C-001 requires department head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000, and P2P-C-003 requires approval before purchase order issuance. Also aware the requester cannot self-approve per P2P-C-002.
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will be routed to the department head for approval before PO issuance, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties.
overall_reason: Given the quarter-end budget pressure and the large purchase amount requiring department head approval, it is critical to create the purchase request immediately to allow sufficient lead time for approval and PO issuance before the deadline while complying with all control requirements.
reason: The purchase amount exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold requiring department head approval. Creating the purchase request now initiates the approval process early enough to meet the quarter-end deadline.
